# BP-164 variant negative: the option updates only the supplied config.
lang: go
file: BP-164-variant-safe.go
variant: option-local-map
---
package sample

type Config struct {
	Retries int
}

type Option func(*Config)

// WithRetries configures the supplied instance.
func WithRetries(retries int) Option {
	return func(config *Config) {
		localRetries := map[string]int{"api": retries}
		config.Retries = localRetries["api"]
	}
}
